x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The 2026 WCWS opens Thursday at Devon Park. Full schedule:

🥎 Noon: Texas Tech vs. Mississippi State
🥎 2:30 PM: Texas vs. Tennessee
🥎 7 PM: Alabama vs. UCLA
🥎 9:30 PM: Nebraska vs. Arkansas

All on ESPN/ESPN2.

#WCWS #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

Texas vs. Tennessee. Alabama vs. UCLA. Texas Tech vs. Mississippi State.

The 2026 WCWS opens Thursday with four elite matchups.

Defending champion. No. 1 seed. First-timer. All on the same day. 🥎

This is going to be special. #WCWS #NCAASoftball

research.facts:
WCWS 2026 Opens Thursday — Four Games, Eight Teams, Devon Park
**Classification:** NEW STORY
**Freshness:** WCWS begins in 2 days (May 28). Opening day matchups confirmed by NCAA and bracket publications May 25.
**Key Facts (MEDIUM-HIGH confidence):**
- WCWS opens May 28, 2026 at Devon Park, Oklahoma City, Oklahoma — MEDIUM (multiple bracket sources confirm)
- Game 1: Texas Tech vs. Mississippi State, noon ET, ESPN — HIGH (bracket confirmed May 25 via sportsbrackets.net, on3.com, Yahoo Sports)
- Game 2: Texas vs. Tennessee, 2:30 PM ET, ESPN — HIGH (same sources)
- Game 3: Alabama vs. UCLA, 7 PM ET, ESPN2 — HIGH (same sources)
- Game 4: Nebraska vs. Arkansas, 9:30 PM ET, ESPN2 — HIGH (same sources)
- Double-elimination format with championship finals June 3–5 — MEDIUM (sportsbrackets.net)
- Two first-timers in field: Arkansas and Mississippi State — HIGH (confirmed May 25 pipeline)
**Sources:**
- sportsbrackets.net/2026/05/25/2026-womens-college-world-series-schedule/
- ncaa.com/news/softball/article/2026-05-25/2026-ncaa-softball-tournament-bracket-schedule
- yahoo.com/articles/womens-college-world-series-bracket-012550135

stories.title: Alabama Enters WCWS as No. 1 Seed With 22 Shutouts and a Case to Make History (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Alabama enters the 2026 WCWS at 49-7 with a 1.60 team ERA.

They threw 22 shutouts this season.

22.

The No. 1 overall seed opens Thursday vs. UCLA at 7 PM ET. 🥎

#RollTide #WCWS #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Alabama has 22 shutouts and a 1.60 ERA in 2026.

That's the No. 1 seed. That's 49-7. That's 16 WCWS appearances.

The Crimson Tide don't just show up to Oklahoma City. They show up to win it. 🥎

#RollTide #WCWS #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Alabama Has 22 Shutouts and a 1.60 ERA. The No. 1 Seed Is Built to Win the 2026 WCWS.

research.facts:
Alabama Enters WCWS as No. 1 Seed With 22 Shutouts
**Classification:** NEW STORY
**Freshness:** Super regional concluded May 24. Alabama profile angle is fresh for WCWS preview cycle.
**Key Facts:**
- Alabama overall record: 49-7 — HIGH (multiple sources: tide1009.com, saturdaydownsouth.com)
- Alabama team ERA: 1.60 (second-best nationally) — MEDIUM (justwomenssports.com)
- Alabama shutouts: 22 on the year — MEDIUM (espn.com college sports regionals preview)
- SEC record: 19-5 — HIGH (tide1009.com)
- WCWS appearance count: 16th time — MEDIUM (saturdaydownsouth.com)
- Regional performance: Three shutouts in Tuscaloosa Regional — MEDIUM (saturdaydownsouth.com)
- Super Regional opponent: No. 16 LSU — HIGH (saturdaydownsouth.com)
- Head coach: Patrick Murphy — MEDIUM (standard knowledge, verify before publishing)
- Alabama opens vs. UCLA on May 28 at 7 PM ET — HIGH (bracket confirmed)
**Sources:**
- tide1009.com/alabama-softball-2026-ncaa-tournament-regionals/
- saturdaydownsouth.com/news/college-softball/top-overall-seed-alabama-smothers-lsu-again

stories.title: Mississippi State Arrives at Their First WCWS With No Map — and No Fear (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Mississippi State just beat the most dominant program in college softball history.

Now they play their FIRST-EVER WCWS game Thursday vs. Texas Tech at noon ET.

No blueprint. No fear. The Bulldogs are here. 🥎

#HailState #WCWS #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Mississippi State's First WCWS: No Blueprint, No Fear, No Pressure

research.facts:
Mississippi State's First WCWS
**Classification:** FOLLOW UP (yesterday: upset of Oklahoma; today: WCWS preview/first-timer angle)
**Freshness:** Follow-up to the May 25 pipeline's top story. Previewing MSU's WCWS debut is natural next step.
**Key Facts:**
- Mississippi State overall record: 42-17 — MEDIUM (not confirmed in search, inferred from context; needs verification)
- Coach Samantha Ricketts: played for Oklahoma 2006–09, holds OU career HR record (48) and RBI record (239) at the time — HIGH (si.com/college/oklahoma article)
- Delainey Everett expected to start vs. Texas Tech — MEDIUM (logical follow from super regional)
- MSU opens vs. Texas Tech noon ET May 28 — HIGH (bracket confirmed)
- MSU is lowest seed remaining after upsetting No. 1 Oklahoma — HIGH (logical from bracket)
**Sources:**
- ncaa.com/news/softball/article/2026-05-24/mississippi-state-clinches-first-ever-wcws-appearance-historic-fashion
- si.com/college/oklahoma/softball/oklahoma-familiar-with-samantha-ricketts
**Note:** MSU record (42-17) is MEDIUM confidence — needs confirmation. Do not use specific record in articles without verifying.

stories.title: NiJaree Canady's Last Chance: The Ace Who Has Done Everything Except Win It All (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
NiJaree Canady is the ONLY active pitcher with 1,000+ career strikeouts and 96 wins.

She's been drafted No. 2 overall in the AUSL. Her college career is almost over.

The one thing left: a national championship. 🥎

#WCWS #NCAASoftball #TexasTech

stories.title: Five SEC Teams at WCWS — and Oklahoma Isn't One of Them (Tier 3)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Five of the eight 2026 WCWS teams are from the SEC.

Alabama. Texas. Tennessee. Arkansas. Mississippi State.

The program that owned the WCWS for 9 straight years?

Oklahoma isn't there for the first time since 2015. 🥎

#WCWS #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Five SEC Teams, Zero Oklahoma: The Conference Power Shift at the 2026 WCWS

research.facts:
SEC Sends Five Teams to WCWS — Oklahoma Absent
**Classification:** NEW STORY
**Freshness:** Full bracket confirmed May 25, making this analysis possible now.
**Key Facts:**
- Five SEC teams: Alabama, Texas, Tennessee, Arkansas, Mississippi State — HIGH (bracket confirmed)
- 3 other teams: Texas Tech (Big 12), Nebraska (Big Ten), UCLA (Big Ten) — HIGH (bracket confirmed)
- Oklahoma absent for first time since 2015 — HIGH (multiple sources confirmed May 25 pipeline)
- Oklahoma's streak was 9 consecutive WCWS appearances — HIGH (May 25 pipeline)
**Sources:**
- espn.com/college-sports/story/_/id/48737007/sec-lands-6-top-8-seeds-ncaa-softball-tournament-bracket
